meta.notes: Scores are MCQ; each question has one correct option. Score per test = (correctCount / totalQuestions) * 5

questions.text: Which number completes the series: 2, 6, 12, 20, ?
From the statements: All X are Y. Some Y are Z. Which conclusion is valid?
If the cost of 3 pens and 2 notebooks is 230 and a pen costs 30 more than a notebook, price of a notebook?
Find the odd one out: [alpha: numeric mapping]  A=1 B=2 C=3 ... Which word has different total: CAT, DOG, BEE, FOX?
A is twice as old as B. After 5 years, sum of ages = 45. Current age of A?
If x*y = x + 2y, what is 3 * 4?
Which of these rules produces the sequence: 1, 4, 9, 16?
If product of two positive integers is 36 and their difference is 3, numbers are:
Choose which conclusion follows: Some M are N. All N are P. Thus:
If 5x + 3 = 2x + 12, x equals:
Find the missing figure in a simple pattern sequence (A,B,C,?). Which rule is typical?
If '>>' means minus and '++' means times, what is 6 >> 2 ++ 3?
Which statement makes the set true: {x| x divisible by 6 and 9}?
Choose the best next item: □ ▲ ○ □ ▲ ○ □ ?
If yesterday was Thursday, what day will it be in 100 days?
Which word is logically related differently: Apple, Banana, Carrot, Grape?
Which of these is a valid syllogism?
options: If p→q and q→r then p→r
If p→q and r→p then r→q
If p→q and q→p then p=q

questions.text: Determine next number: 3, 5, 11, 21, 43, ?

options: If not B then not A
